I'm Tuan Anh

zsh — 80x24

The Linux Way

Passion for computers started early. I don't just use software; I want to understand how it communicates with the kernel. My journey is rooted in the **Ubuntu/Linux** ecosystem, where I've learned that everything is a file and the command line is the most powerful tool.

System optimization and shell scripting
Deep dive into memory management and OS internals 
$ neofetch
            .-/+oossssoo+/-.
        `:+ssssssssssssssssss+:`
      -+ssssssssssssssssssyyssss+-
    .ossssssssssshdyysdmmhssssssso.
   /sssssssssshmdhyhmmdhyssssssssh/
  +ssssssssyhNd8888888888888dhyssssss+
 /ssssssssd8888888888888888888888888888s\
 ssssssssh88888888888888888888888888888s
